business.headline: Sensex, Nifty close higher despite rupee hitting fresh record lowThe BSE Sensex rose 117.54 points, or 0.16%, to close at 75,318.39, while the NSE Nifty50 gained 41 points, or 0.17%, to settle at 23,659.

Banks may soon have to share more details on risks and financial health, says RBIOn Tuesday, the RBI released a draft circular, wherein banks will be required to publish more detailed information on important financial measures such as capital adequacy, leverage, liquidity and risks.

EPFO may soon let you withdraw funds through UPILabour Minister Mansukh Mandaviya said on Tuesday that the Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) has completed testing for a facility that would allow members to withdraw their Employees' Provident Fund (EPF) using the UPI payment gateway.

The move sharpened concerns around imported inflation, market volatility and pressure on India's import bill.

Sensex, Nifty down: Why is stock market falling today?The BSE Sensex fell 389.19 points, or 0.52%, to 74,811.66 in early trade, while the NSE Nifty50 dropped 107.90 points, or 0.46%, to 23,510.10 as of 9:39 am.

Wait 5 years for gratuity or take the pay hike? Here's what Indian workers saidYou are just months away from gratuity when a recruiter calls with a tempting pay hike. Do you wait for guaranteed money, or take the career leap? To understand what people really choose, I spoke to Indian professionals across sectors, and the answers were surprisingly divided.

ICICI Bank hikes debit card DCC fee from 1% to 3.5%: What it meansDynamic Currency Conversion, commonly called DCC, allows customers to pay in their home currency instead of the local currency while making international transactions.

As lenders tighten checks and nearly 3 in 10 loan applications show income mismatches, can you still get a personal loan without trouble? Let's find out here.

Why foreign investors are shunning India: Surjit Bhalla points out root causeEven as India's economy faces mounting pressure from rising crude oil prices and disruptions in fertiliser and energy supplies, economist and author Surjit Bhalla has identified a worsening investment climate as the country's biggest challenge.

Sensex, Nifty end lower as banking drag offsets IT rally; rupee hits record lowThe S&P BSE Sensex slipped 114.19 points, or 0.15%, to close at 75,200.85, while the NSE Nifty50 fell 31.95 points, or 0.14%, to settle at 23,618.

Govt likely to receive a big dividend from RBI in FY 27The Reserve Bank of India is expected to approve a record surplus transfer to the government this week. The payout could give the exchequer extra room as higher energy prices add fresh uncertainty.

Want to update Aadhaar for free? UIDAI has extended the deadline againThe UIDAI has announced that Aadhaar holders can continue updating documents linked to their Aadhaar card free of cost through the myAadhaar portal till June 14, 2027. The facility was earlier set to end in June 2026.

Rupee hits record low yet again, nears Rs 97 against US dollarThe rupee slipped to a fresh record low of 96.44 against the US dollar on Tuesday, nearing the Rs 97 mark. Rising crude prices, weak capital inflows and higher US yields are adding to pressure on India's external finances despite RBI intervention.

As milk, fuel and gold get costlier, here are 7 everyday expenses families may cutThe grocery bill feels heavier. Filling the petrol tank costs more. Even an occasional gold purchase suddenly seems expensive. Across India, rising prices are pinching household budgets, leaving many families asking: What everyday expenses can we cut without making life harder? Let's have a look.

Before you file your ITR this year, don't miss these details in AIS and Form 26ASAre you about to file your income tax return without checking AIS and Form 26AS? Before you hit submit, it may be worth taking a closer look, as even small mismatches in income or tax details can create problems later.

entertainment.headline: Samay Raina was super nervous during Latent 2 shoot with Alia Bhatt, Sharvari A viral social media post has sparked buzz around India's Got Latent Season 2, with Alia Bhatt and Sharvari reportedly appearing in the first episode to promote Alpha. Why RJ Balaji insisted on a May release for Suriya's Karuppu As Karuppu races towards Rs 200 crore, RJ Balaji revealed why he rejected multiple release dates and waited months to bring Suriya's film to theatres in May.

The Apple TV series uses that spiral to explore loneliness, desperation and digital-age distrust.

Janhvi Kapoor plays cricket with Pat Cummins, knocks out bystander's phone at event Australian cricketer Pat Cummins bowled to Janhvi Kapoor during a playful cricket exchange at a Mumbai event. The clip caught attention online after her shot nearly hit a bystander's phone.

Gullak 5 trailer: Mishra family returns with new challenges and old warmth The trailer for Gullak Season 5 brings the Mishra family back ahead of its June 5 release on Sony LIV. It points to a season shaped by change at home, growing responsibilities and the pull of familiar roots.

Actor Ravi Mohan begins Sabarimala vratam after emotional press meet Amid ongoing controversy around his divorce and recent public remarks, actor Ravi Mohan has taken up the Sabarimala vratam, drawing fresh attention to his personal life.

Shagun Sharma on quitting Kyunki for Khatron Ke Khiladi: Wanted to grow in life Actor Shagun Sharma said she has only taken a break from Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi to join Khatron Ke Khiladi 15. She said the team supported her wish to grow, try non-fiction and overcome her fears.

Drishyam 3 nears Rs 24 crore pre-sales, eyes second-biggest Malayalam opening Mohanlal's Drishyam 3 is heading for a strong May 21 opening after promising pre-release sales in India and overseas. The booking trend has put the Jeethu Joseph thriller in line for one of Malayalam cinema's biggest starts.

Hema Malini praises Krishnavataram after attending special screening in Mathura Hema Malini attended a special screening of Krishnavataram - Part 1: The Heart in Mathura and later congratulated director Hardik Gajjar. The event came days after Uttar Pradesh declared the film tax-free following a Lucknow screening.

Bajre di roti to eagle: What Big B wrote in his blog post after hospital discharge Amitabh Bachchan shared a cryptic post on his blog amid hospitalisation reports. A PTI-cited source said it was a routine monthly check-up.

Cocktail 2's Mashooqa compared to 1993 Italian track: Internet says 'bad copy' Mashooqa from Cocktail 2 sparked an online debate after listeners compared it to the 1993 Italian song Se So Arrubate A Nonna. While some accused composer Pritam of copying the tune, others defended it as a case of sampling, a common practice in the music industry.

Jr NTR, Prashanth Neel share a hug as Dragon glimpse storms the internet Jr NTR and Prashanth Neel shared a tight hug as the first glimpse of Dragon was unveiled late on May 19, minutes before his birthday. The moment quickly drew attention online and added to the buzz around their first collaboration.

R Madhavan calls out wellness brand over unauthorised ad use, legal notice sent Madhavan has accused wellness brand Elevate Now of using his video and image without consent to promote weight loss programmes. He said the reel falsely suggested his endorsement, adding that a legal notice had been sent.

War 2 may have failed, but Jr NTR isn't done playing anti-hero. Now enters Dragon Jr NTR is taking a bold step into darker, morally complex characters with his upcoming film Dragon, despite the failure of War 2. The teaser, released in five languages, has created high anticipation ahead of its June 2027 release.

Jr NTR scolds security for mishandling fans in midnight birthday celebration. Video A viral video showed Jr NTR losing his cool at a security staff member during his midnight birthday celebrations in Hyderabad. The clip drew attention online as fans crowded outside his home and the first glimpse of Dragon was unveiled.

Meryl Streep-Martin Short's simple date night is internet's new favourite love story A quiet London dinner outing by Meryl Streep and Martin Short has left the internet emotional over their understated romance. Fans flooded social media with reactions, calling the candid moment "love in its purest form."

Jack Ryan's John Krasinski enters Dhurandhar era, wants to watch Ranveer's film John Krasinski, known for his role as Jack Ryan, praises Indian cinema as some of the most cutting-edge filmmaking and expresses interest in watching Ranveer Singh's film Dhurandhar.

Who is Inder Kaur, Punjabi singer who was found dead in Ludhiana canal? Punjabi singer Inder Kaur was found dead in Ludhiana's Neelo Canal six days after she went missing. Her death has drawn attention to her music career and social media presence.

general news.headline: Why TMC-run Kolkata civic body is targeting Abhishek BanerjeeThe Kolkata Municipal Corporation, which is controlled by the TMC, has sent demolition notices to 17 properties linked to the party's own MP Abhishek Banerjee. It has raised a key question. Why would a TMC-controlled civic body go after the party's No.2?

Twisha Sharma died by suicide: Bhopal top cop as 'dowry death' probe continuesWhile emphasising that the police are investigating the case strictly from a suicide angle, the Commissioner noted that the ongoing probe will now focus on determining the specific circumstances that drove her to take such an extreme step.

60 days or leave: Indians with H-1B visa struggling to survive after layoffsThousands of Indians on H-1B visas are facing uncertainty after fresh layoffs at major tech firms like Meta and Amazon. With only 60 days to find a new job, many are now struggling to stay in the US amid tighter immigration scrutiny.

Meet the cockroach who's launched India's newest political partyAbhijeet Dipke said the Cockroach Janata Party emerged after the Chief Justice's remarks angered young Indians online. He said the response reflected wider frustration among Gen Z over representation, jobs and political discourse.
India, Italy and the Melodi hai chocolateyBeyond the bilateral agreements, Modi and Meloni are in on the joke together. Melodi is adding grist to the meme mill.

Live: India, Italy working to deepen ties, says PM Modi after meet with PM MeloniPM Modi Five-Nation Tour Live Updates: Prime Minister Narendra Modi held bilateral talks with Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni on Wednesday during the final leg of his five-nation diplomatic tour. Earlier in the day, PM Modi was accorded a ceremonial guard of honour in Italy. PM Modi arrived in Italy on Tuesday at the invitation of Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni. The Indian Prime Minister received a warm welcome from members of the Indian diaspora, cultural performers and local supporters gathered at his hotel in the Italian capital. Soon after landing, PM Modi met Meloni over dinner and later visited the Colosseum with the Italian leader, where the two exchanged views on a range of issues ahead of formal bilateral discussions. The two leaders also shared photographs from their meeting on social media, triggering another wave of "#Melodi" reactions online over their widely discussed camaraderie. Follow indiatoday.in for all the latest updates.

Parle Products is the firm producing the Melody toffee.

Why Nepal is objecting to Kailash Mansarovar Yatra via Lipulekh PassNepal has objected to the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra via Lipulekh Pass, saying the route crosses territory it claims. The dispute traces back to the 1816 Treaty of Sugauli and competing claims over the Kali river's origin, making a religious journey part of a larger geopolitical contest.

Melody to Melodi: How a 1983 Indian candy turned into a diplomatic symbolLaunched in 1983 as an affordable caramel-chocolate toffee, Parle's Melody has survived changing snack trends for decades. Now, after PM Narendra Modi gifted it to Italy PM Giorgia Meloni in Rome, the Re 1 candy has transformed into a viral diplomatic symbol tied to the internet-famous "Melodi" meme.

Melody toffeesThe clip quickly went viral online, clocking nearly a million views along with over 56,000 reactions and around 5,000 comments within an hour of being posted. Social media platforms were flooded with memes, screenshots and jokes, with many users calling it the "ultimate #Melodi moment".

Lashkar terrorist wanted shiny teeth, fuller hair, got procedures done in GurugramSources said Shabbir Ahmad Lone underwent hair transplant and dental treatment in Gurugram after his arrest by the Delhi Police Special Cell. Investigators believe the procedures were part of an effort to alter his appearance while operating Lashkar networks from outside India.

SRK charges Rs 15 crore, Ronaldo Rs 25 crore. Modi did it for free for Parle MelodyPM Narendra Modi handed Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni a bag of Parle Melody toffees. The episode has revived questions about privacy, consent and the eroding limits of celebrity coverage.

Vijay cannot stop Tamil Nadu's blockbuster freebies film. So, what must he do?With his pre-election promise of liberal give-aways—on top of massive existing ones—Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay has shown that the freebie culture is not episodic, it is chronic. Every promise that he made carries a massive recurring price tag that must be paid in hard cash, not cinema tickets. How can he foot the bill?

Why is Delhi feeling so hot even at night?These hotter nights mean the air barely cools, leaving residents tossing and turning in stuffy rooms, unable to find rest after bearing an already hot day.

Why Xi met Putin days after hosting TrumpJust four days after hosting US President Donald Trump in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping is hosting another global heavyweight, Russian President Vladimir Putin. What urgency drove the Xi-Putin meeting so soon after Trump's visit? What message is China trying to send to the world?

India's clinical trials rebound, but first-in-human testing lagsIndia's clinical research industry is recovering, but first-in-human studies still face caution. That gap could shape how quickly patients access new therapies and where innovation lands.

sports.headline: Your last Test as captain? Shan Masood irked by reporter's question in Bangladesh Bangladesh vs Pakistan, 2nd Test: Asked if this was his last Test as captain, Shan Masood stayed measured after Pakistan's humbling loss to Bangladesh in Sylhet on Wednesday. He urged focus on improving Test cricket, stressing the need not to enforce wholesale changes.

Phil Salt set to return as RCB get major boost before IPL 2026 playoffs Phil Salt is set to rejoin Royal Challengers Bengaluru this week after a month out with a finger injury. Salt has been out of action for almost a month after suffering an injury during a league game.

Sanju Samson quashes beef with Heinrich Klaasen after bust-up in CSK vs SRH Sanju Samson and Heinrich Klaasen cooled tempers after their Chepauk exchange over a stumping dismissal. Samson and Klaasen expressed their admiration for each other with their posts on Instagram.

When and where to buy IPL 2026 playoffs, final tickets: Complete guide Irfan Pathan said Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is beginning to create Chris Gayle-like fear after his 38-ball 93 against Lucknow Super Giants. The knock took the teenager to 53 sixes this season, putting Gayle's IPL record firmly under threat.

Like Gayle, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is going to be feared by bowlers: Irfan Pathan Following an explosive 38-ball 93 against LSG, Rajasthan Royals' teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is drawing massive praise from former Indian stars Irfan Pathan and Sanjay Bangar, who see shades of a prime Chris Gayle in the 15-year-old.

Shreyas Iyer main contender for India T20I captaincy, says Ricky Ponting IPL 2026: Ricky Ponting has positioned Shreyas Iyer as a leading contender for India's T20I captaincy despite Punjab Kings' slump. The defending world champions will tour Ireland and England for T20I series after the IPL.

Riyan Parag hits out at commentators for off-field antics: Talk only about cricket Riyan Parag has urged commentators to stop personal criticism of IPL players, saying athletes are human too, while also praising 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's maturity after his stunning 93.

Bangladesh teammates troll Rizwan with Bollywood jibes BAN vs PAK, 2nd Test: Mohammad Rizwan and Litton Das traded sharp words on Day 4 of the Sylhet Test, which Pakistan lost by 73 runs. Bangladesh's stump-mic Bollywood jibes went viral on social media.

Another Banglawash: Pakistan sink to new low despite Rizwan fight in Sylhet Test BAN vs PAK, 2nd Test: Bangladesh outclassed Pakistan by 78 runs in Sylhet on Wednesday to complete a 2-0 Test sweep. It is the second successive 0-2 defeat for Pakistan against Bangladesh as they slipped to No. 8 in the World Test Championship cycle.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reveals meaning behind 'A' celebration that's gone viral Vaibhav Sooryavanshi revealed the secret behind his new 'A' celebration which he brought out after his half-century against the Lucknow Super Giants in Jaipur.

KKR vs MI: Playoff hopes on the line for Kolkata as Mumbai look to crash party KKR vs MI Preview: Three-time champions Kolkata Knight Riders find themselves in a do-or-die situation as they take on an already-eliminated Mumbai Indians at Eden Gardens on Wednesday, with their IPL 2026 playoff hopes hanging in the balance.

Can I get a photo? Australia great turns Sooryavanshi fanboy after Jaipur stormIPL 2026: After Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's 93 in Jaipur, Lucknow Super Giants coach Justin Langer interrupted a shoot to ask him for a photo. It showed how the Rajasthan Royals prodigy is leaving elite bowlers and veterans mesmerised.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi not buying into the hype, its just the start of a long journeyRR vs LSG: Following a spectacular 38-ball 93 that dismantled LSG, 15-year-old sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi remains incredibly grounded, brushing off the sudden media frenzy to focus purely on the long cricket journey that lies ahead of him.

Ravindra Jadeja 2.0? Harsh Dubey could be India's next all-format weaponIndia have called up Vidarbha all-rounder Harsh Dubey for the one-off Test and ODI series against Afghanistan. The move puts the record-breaking domestic performer in the frame as a long-term successor to Ravindra Jadeja.

India's squad vs Afghanistan: Decoding big snubs, what it means for the futureThe squad announcement for the Afghanistan series marks the official blueprint for India's future. While senior pillars remain, the selectors have actively initiated a transition phase, blooding a younger core ahead of the 2027 World Cup cycle.

Arsenal crowned Premier League champions: The 22-year wait is finally overArsenal are Premier League champions, ending a 22-year drought. Mikel Arteta's side clinched the title after Manchester City's 1-1 draw at Bournemouth, sparking wild celebrations ahead of Sunday's coronation clash at Crystal Palace.

Play of the Day: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi 2.0 stuns LSG with controlled aggressionIPL 2026, RR vs LSG: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scored 93 runs off 38 balls against the Lucknow Super Giants on Tuesday in Jaipur, but during his innings, he also displayed maturity and patience, revealing another side to his game.

Rishabh Pant drops the F-bomb on live TV: LSG are a f***g good teamIPL 2026: Rishabh Pant backed Lucknow Super Giants after their loss to Rajasthan Royals and used an expletive on live television. The remark came as Lucknow slipped to the bottom of the table and Pant faced mounting pressure.

IPL playoff scenario: Rajasthan Royals keep fate in own hands for 4th spotIPL 2026, RR vs LSG: Rajasthan Royals have made life difficult for the other teams in playoff contention after defeating Lucknow Super Giants by seven wickets on Tuesday, May 19 at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur.

RR ride the Vaibhav Sooryavanshi storm to crush LSG and tighten playoff gripIPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals chased 221 against Lucknow Super Giants on the back of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's 93 and Dhruv Jurel's unbeaten 53. The win kept RR in the playoff race, lifted them above Punjab Kings and left Mitchell Marsh's 96 in vain.

Chris Gayle, watch out: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi first Indian with 50 sixes in IPL seasonIPL 2026, RR vs LSG: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the first Indian to hit 50 sixes in an Indian Premier League season and is closing in on Chris Gayle's long-standing record for most sixes in a single edition.

Where's your chit now? Sunil Gavaskar mocks LSG's Aakash Singh on live TVIPL 2026: Sunil Gavaskar criticised Lucknow Super Giants pacer Aakash Singh during the IPL 2026 clash against Rajasthan Royals after the youngster conceded heavily while defending 220 in Jaipur. Gavaskar questioned Singh's on-field celebrations as teenage batter Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powered RR's chase with a stunning 38-ball 93.

Karman Kaur Thandi crashes out of French Open in horror Grand Slam comebackFrench Open 2026: Karman Kaur Thandi endured a difficult outing on Tuesday as Harmony Tan needed just 57 minutes to secure a dominant 6-1, 6-0 win in the opening round of the qualifiers.

Mohammad Rizwan Pakistan's last hope as Bangladesh near Test series sweepBAN vs PAK, 2nd Test: Mohammad Rizwan remained unbeaten on 75 as Pakistan are looking to chase 437 in the Sylhet Test, still needing 121 runs for victory, with Bangladesh firmly in control and strong favourites to win the match.

Struggling Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of Wimbledon after missing French OpenWorld No. 2 Carlos Alcaraz confirmed that he will miss the upcoming Wimbledon Championships, scheduled to begin in June, as he continues his recovery from a wrist injury. The Spaniard announced his withdrawal from this year's tournament due to the lingering issue.

Virat Kohli urges next generation to chase greatness beyond instant IPL fameStar Indian batter Virat Kohli urged young cricketers not to get carried away by the instant fame and financial rewards of the IPL, saying the real challenge lies in staying committed to the sport for a long period and earning respect across the cricketing world.

Are IPL teams forcing injured stars to play? BCCI secretary breaks silenceIPL 2026: BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia said franchises make the final call on injured players during the IPL. His remarks followed scrutiny over KKR playing Varun Chakravarthy despite a hairline fracture.

England Women's T20 World Cup scare: Sciver-Brunt ruled out of warm-up seriesNat Sciver-Brunt will miss England's T20 series against New Zealand and India after a calf tear. The injury disrupts a crucial World Cup build-up and forces further changes to England's squad.

Never back down: PV Sindhu reveals priceless advice from Virat Kohli on special meetIndia's badminton star PV Sindhu revealed the inspiring advice she received from Virat Kohli during their recent meeting in Bengaluru, praising the RCB star for constantly guiding and motivating fellow athletes.

Big blow for RR as injured Riyan Parag misses LSG clashIPL 2026: Riyan Parag missed Rajasthan Royals' clash against Lucknow Super Giants with a hamstring injury. His absence, along with Ravindra Jadeja's continued recovery, has added to RR's playoff worries.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
